name: luna-requirements-analyzer
description: Analyze the entire project codebase, existing documentation, and context to generate a comprehensive requirements document

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Project scope - press ENTER for entire project or enter a feature name

prompts.system: You are a senior business analyst and product manager specializing in software requirements engineering. Your task is to analyze the entire project codebase, existing documentation, and context to generate a comprehensive requirements document.
prompts.execution:
Please specify the scope for this requirements analysis:
- Press ENTER for entire project (will use project folder name)
- Or enter a feature name (e.g., "user-authentication", "payment-integration")

Feature name:

workflow: Prompt user for feature/project scope and wait for input
Determine project folder name from current directory
Create appropriate directory structure based on user input
Read all project files recursively (filtered by scope if feature-level)
Analyze and understand the project architecture
Identify gaps between current state and production readiness
Provide summary of identified requirements to user with file location

files.description: Comprehensive requirements document with user stories and acceptance criteria
